name: German Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Prepare cake; in preparing cake, substitute milk for water, margarine or butter for oil; add flavorings. Bake according to directions on box.
GERMAN CHOCOLATE ICING: Combine evaporated milk, sugar, egg yolks, butter or margarine; vanilla flavoring. Cook the above ingredients on medium heat, stirring constantly until thick (about 2 minutes). Add coconut and pecans. Cook until thick enough to spread.
